articles.title: Peter Brandt warns of $800 Ethereum drop as XRP overtakes ETH in FDV
articles.description: 19-4-2025 – Seasoned market strategist Peter Brandt has rattled the cryptocurrency sphere with a stark warning about Ethereum’s trajectory. The veteran trader’s technical analysis reveals a descending triangle pattern, suggesting the second-largest cryptocurrency could plummet to $800—a level not witnessed since the 2022 market downturn.
